subject: (no subject)
body:
et me get this straight.. up until now Barry thought
there was sex with  Saige...  Saige , was brought to
the house by Haley a strippr who toldboth her and
others to lie about their age.. HEr allegations as I
understand them was that she kept on her thong,, she
climbed on top of me.... to massage me and I " whacked
off".... THis comes from a drug using kid, whose
father , a felon, complained months later.. She had a
web page where she had a nude photo representing her,
changing her age at least three times.from 17 -16-15.
.., a police report from the palm beach police, says
she is using drugs, and has been in rehab since 14.,.
she runs away from home in georgia , and ends up in a
drug den,,, she then has a new web site, that says
fuck ya2, straddling her boyfriend... , They are
taking her word, no corroboration, no credibility, I
passed the lie detector test, she never came back, she
left her phone number , got paid, said she is goingto
make 250000$..Can you tell me, Why Barry says he needs
a felony...
Saige
